summary: Completed full E2E testing of BIBI Cars CRM services → invoices → orders flow. All backend APIs (13/13) and frontend pages (6/6) passed successfully. The payment and order workflow is fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: Create multi-line invoice with service_id + custom items (POST /api/manager/invoices)
Backend: Mark invoice paid - auto-creates order (PATCH /api/invoices/{id}/mark-paid)
Backend: Get manager orders - order auto-created with 6 workflow steps (GET /api/manager/orders)
Backend: Update order step to done (PATCH /api/orders/{id}/steps/{stepId})
Backend: Team lead can see all orders (GET /api/team/orders)
Backend: Customer cabinet shows orders without auth (GET /api/customer-cabinet/{customerId}/orders)
Frontend: Admin Services page - create/edit service modal with workflow builder
Frontend: Manager Invoices page - multi-line builder with catalog picker
Frontend: Manager Orders page - list, detail view, workflow steps visible
Frontend: Team Orders page - KPI cards, filters, aggregate view
Frontend: Customer Cabinet - real order status, progress bars, workflow steps grouped by service, auto-refresh ready

backend_flow.services_catalog: ✅ Master admin can create services with custom workflow steps. Services appear in public catalog immediately.
backend_flow.invoice_creation: ✅ Manager can create multi-line invoices mixing catalog services and custom items. Total calculation is correct (200 + 350*2 = 900).
backend_flow.payment_flow: ✅ Manual mark-paid endpoint works correctly and auto-creates order with workflow steps from all invoice items.
backend_flow.order_management: ✅ Order auto-created with 6 steps (3 from service workflow + 3 fallback from custom line). Step status updates work correctly (pending → in_progress → done). Order status recalculates based on step progress.
backend_flow.notes: ✅ Notes can be added to orders and are persisted correctly.
backend_flow.team_visibility: ✅ Team lead can see all orders across managers with correct aggregation.
backend_flow.customer_cabinet: ✅ Customer cabinet endpoint is unauthenticated as designed and shows real order data with workflow progress.

frontend_flow.admin_services: ✅ Service creation modal opens correctly. Workflow builder allows adding/editing steps. Form validation works.
frontend_flow.manager_invoices: ✅ Multi-line invoice builder functional. Catalog picker shows services. Can add both catalog services and custom lines. Detail drawer shows linked order after payment.
frontend_flow.manager_orders: ✅ Orders list displays with progress bars. Detail view opens showing workflow steps. Step update buttons (Старт/Готово) are present and functional. Notes textarea works.
frontend_flow.team_orders: ✅ KPI cards show aggregate metrics. Filters work (status, manager). Table displays all orders with progress indicators.
frontend_flow.customer_cabinet: ✅ Real order data displayed (not mocked). Steps grouped by service. Progress bars show completion percentage. Auto-refresh interval set to 30s. No JWT required.
